devdoc.details: This contract preserves the core probability-weighted pricing logic from the original      speedrun-ethereum PredictionMarket.sol but adapts it to:       - Trade ERC-1155 CTF positions instead of ERC-20 tokens       - Use USDC (ERC-20) as collateral instead of ETH       - Support multiple markets (pools) without deploying a new contract per market       - Disable trading after the CTF condition is resolved PRICING ALGORITHM (preserved from original):  Buy/Sell price = initialTokenValue × avgProbability × amount  Where probability = targetTokensSold / totalTokensSold for both outcomes  avgProbability = (probabilityBefore + probabilityAfter) / 2 Each pool is identified by a `conditionId` derived from the CTF:  conditionId = keccak256(adapter, questionId, outcomeSlotCount)

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

buyTokens(bytes32,uint256,uint256,uint25.details: Caller must have approved this contract for `maxUsdcIn` USDC.

params.maxUsdcIn: Maximum USDC willing to pay (slippage protection).
params.tokenAmount: Number of outcome tokens to buy (18 decimals).

createPool(bytes32,uint256,uint256,uint2.details: Caller must have already approved this contract to spend `usdcAmount` USDC.      The USDC is split-positioned into YES/NO ERC-1155 tokens by the CTF;      then deposited into the pool as reserves.

params.conditionId: The CTF conditionId derived from keccak256(adapter, questionId, 2).
params.noTokenId: ERC-1155 NO positionId from the CTF.
params.percentageToLock: % of token supply locked to simulate initial probability (1-99).
params.usdcAmount: Amount of USDC to provide as initial liquidity.
params.yesTokenId: ERC-1155 YES positionId from the CTF.

markResolved(bytes32).details: Anyone can call this once the CTF condition has been resolved.      The actual payout distribution happens via ctf.redeemPositions().

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

sellTokens(bytes32,uint256,uint256,uint2.details: Caller must have called ctf.setApprovalForAll(ammAddress, true) first.

params.tokenAmount: Number of outcome tokens to sell.

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[EIP section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

withdrawAfterResolution(bytes32).details: Wallet-held locked seed tokens must still be redeemed via CTF.redeemPositions by the LP.

devdoc.title: PredictionMarketAMM

addLiquidity(bytes32,uint256).notice: LP owner adds more liquidity to an existing pool.

allPools(uint256).notice: List of all conditionIds for enumeration

createPool(bytes32,uint256,uint256,uint2.notice: Creates an AMM pool for a CTF binary market and seeds initial liquidity.

getBuyPrice(bytes32,uint256,uint256).notice: Calculate USDC cost to buy `tokenAmount` outcome tokens.  Preserves the original probability-weighted price model.

getLpNav(bytes32).notice: Estimated net asset value attributable to the LP (revenue + pool + wallet inventory).

getLpPnLSummary(bytes32).notice: LP PnL snapshot: nav + prior withdrawals minus total deposits.

getLpWalletInventoryValue(bytes32,addres.notice: Redemption value of an LP wallet's YES/NO balances for this pool.

getPoolInventoryValue(bytes32).notice: Mark-to-market (open) or redemption value (resolved) of AMM-held YES/NO reserves.

getSellPrice(bytes32,uint256,uint256).notice: Calculate USDC received for selling `tokenAmount` outcome tokens.

getYesProbability(bytes32).notice: Returns current implied probability of YES outcome (scaled by PRECISION).

markResolved(bytes32).notice: Marks a pool as resolved so trading is disabled.

removeLiquidity(bytes32,uint256).notice: LP owner removes liquidity from an existing pool.

withdrawAfterResolution(bytes32).notice: LP owner withdraws trading revenue and redeems AMM-held reserves after resolution.

userdoc.notice: AMM for trading YES/NO ERC-1155 CTF outcome tokens.
